revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:穂積神社]]
'''Hozumi Shrine''' (穂積神社)
* {{ill|Hozumi Shrine (Takasaki)|ja|穂積神社 (高崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi Shrine (Takasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579111|1=Hozumi Shrine (Takasaki)}} - Located in {{ill|Yoshii, Takasaki|ja|吉井町本郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshii, Takasaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|qid=Q336438|lt=Takasaki|1=Takasaki}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hozumi Shrine (Saitama)|ja|穂積神社 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi Shrine (Saitama)|1=Hozumi Shrine (Saitama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124482325}} - Located in {{ill|Minegishi, Nishi-ku|ja|峰岸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minegishi, Nishi-ku|1=Q11476134|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11476134}}, {{ill|Nishi-ku, Saitama|en|Nishi-ku, Saitama|qid=Q1075040|lt=Nishi-ku, Saitama|1=Nishi-ku, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama (city)|en|Saitama (city)|qid=Q134635|lt=Saitama|1=Saitama (city)}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hozumi Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja|穂積神社 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi Shrine (Shizuoka)|1=Hozumi Shrine (Shizuoka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q134925540}} - Located in {{ill|Hirayama, Aoi-ku|ja|平山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirayama, Aoi-ku|1=Hirayama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q422548}}, {{ill|Aoi-ku, Shizuoka|en|Aoi-ku, Shizuoka|qid=Q1131483|lt=Aoi-ku, Shizuoka|1=Aoi-ku, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka (city)|en|Shizuoka (city)|qid=Q174691|lt=Shizuoka|1=Shizuoka (city)}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.
